heading: Accountability to taxpayers through monitoring and oversight
label: 7934 Accountability to taxpayers through monitoring and oversight

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Every Student Succeeds Act, and not as part of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 which comprises this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: comply with all monitoring requirements under the applicable program or programs; and

children.label: B
children.text: monitor properly any subgrantee under the applicable program or programs;

children.label: A
children.text: to understand trends and identify common issues; and

children.label: B
children.text: to issue guidance to help grantees address such issues before the loss or misuse of taxpayer funding occurs;
publicly report the work undertaken by the Secretary to prevent fraud, waste, and abuse with respect to such taxpayer funds; and

work with the Office of Inspector General of the Department of Education, as needed, to help ensure that employees of the Department understand how to adequately monitor grantees and to help grantees adequately monitor any subgrantees.
